title: geranium incanum subsp. nyassense
intro: Geranium incanum subsp. nyassense, also known as Nyassaland geranium, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Geranium incanum subsp. nyassense include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and infections.
